action.reasoning: Observation: The previous iteration failed instantly because the bash command tried to write eval_config.json into /data, which is read-only. The file contents (model.py, predict.py, train.py) were never executed. Analysis: We need to create a local temporary directory for eval_config.json to test predict.py offline. We also need to ensure train.py is complete and robust. Decision: Rewrite all three files, create local_test_eval directory with eval_config.json, run train.py for 3 epochs, test predict.py locally, and submit evaluation.
action.command: mkdir -p local_test_eval && echo '{"test_period": ["2022-01-01", "2023-12-31"], "universe": "csi300", "feature_set": "Alpha158"}' > local_test_eval/eval_config.json && python train.py --epochs 3 && python predict.py --data_path local_test_eval --checkpoint checkpoints --output local_test_output.json
